mechanism_narrative: A sustained decline in the federal funds rate signals an easing monetary cycle that compresses discount rates applied to equity cash flows, producing positive S&P 500 forward returns over the next 20 trading days.
failure_condition: Walk-forward Rank IC remains below 0.03 over any 2-year rolling window, or 20-day forward returns in easing periods are not significantly higher than baseline (t-test p > 0.05).

mechanism_narrative: A sharp increase in the unemployment rate above 4.0% over one month signals deteriorating labor market conditions, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as investor confidence weakens.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite negative signal.

mechanism_narrative: Simultaneous declines in industrial production and rising inflation signal stagflation risks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns as monetary policy faces conflicting constraints.
candidate_trigger: INDPRO falls > 1% in 1 month and CPIAUCSL rises > 0.5% in 1 month
failure_condition: Combined signal fails to predict negative returns in > 40% of triggered instances.

mechanism_narrative: Strong GDP growth coupled with elevated housing starts indicates robust economic demand, but in late-cycle regimes, this signals overvaluation and potential market correction.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 20d returns in > 50% of instances during late-cycle regimes despite high demand indicators.

mechanism_narrative: A sharp drop in industrial production below 100 signals weakening supply-side capacity, leading to negative S&P 500 forward returns as recession risks rise.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 5d returns in > 60% of triggered instances despite declining industrial production.

mechanism_narrative: Strong housing starts above 1700 thousand units indicate resilient demand, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns as construction activity boosts economic growth.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 20d returns in > 50% of instances despite elevated housing starts.

mechanism_narrative: Persistent inflation above 280 in the CPI signals central bank intervention risks, causing negative S&P 500 forward returns as rate hike expectations rise.
failure_condition: SPX produces positive 60d returns in > 50% of instances during high inflation periods.

mechanism_narrative: Strong payroll growth above 149,000 jobs signals a tight labor market, driving positive S&P 500 forward returns as corporate earnings benefit from wage pressures.
failure_condition: SPX produces negative 5d returns in > 50% of instances despite strong payroll growth.
